rationale: bakta_pfam_domains has silent coverage gaps in 7/33 (21%) of marker Pfams (matching the [plant_microbiome_ecotypes] pitfall pattern of 12/22 markers missing). interproscan_domains has only 1/33 markers with zero clusters and is the authoritative Pfam source per Phase 1A substrate audit (833M Pfam hits, 83.8% cluster coverage). Phase 3 architectural deep-dive uses interproscan_domains as the substrate.
